subcodes.first_line: ...Supplication and prayer on behalf of others will surely be effective.  When hearts are united, when faces are turned towards the kingdom of Abha, surely enlightenment will be the result.
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @unity of thought and belief, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power of prayer
